professionals.name: Dr. Ivánfi Judit
professionals.bio: General practitioner in Harkány. Education: POTE 2001. Board certification in family medicine in 2013. Studies listed at PTE/POTE, including legal medical qualification, preventive medicine residency, and family medicine residency. Professional experience includes long-term substitution in adult and mixed districts between 2013 and 2016.
